_comment_root: StrictDocStarter configuration template. Run 'setup-strictdoc.bat config' to generate setup.config.json from this file. Then edit and type 'yes' to confirm.
_comment_inventory: Always installed (required): Git; Python; GitHub CLI; StrictDoc; VS Code; Claude Code extension. Toggleable below: Claude Code CLI (winget|npm, opt-in); Obsidian; Windows Terminal; PowerShell 7; ripgrep; jq; skip_clone (Phase D).

repository._comment: GitHub repository to clone in Phase D. Leave 'url' empty to skip Phase D entirely. Example: 'https://github.com/GoodRelax/gr-cheat-sheets.git'

paths._comment: Where to clone the repository on this machine. <user> is replaced with $env:USERNAME at runtime (FR-208 / Expand-UserPlaceholders). Replace 'YourRepo' with the actual repo name when repository.url is set.

vault._comment: Obsidian vault location. mode: 'local' or 'onedrive'. <user> is replaced at runtime (FR-208). junction_name is a placeholder - set it to your actual project name (used as the junction display name in the vault).

git._comment: Git user info (password is asked at runtime, not stored).

_comment_proxy_disabled: Proxy auto-configuration is OUT OF SCOPE in v1.0 (FR-700). StrictDocStarter detects proxies (IE / env var / WinHTTP) and warns at runtime, but does NOT configure git/pip/winget/code. See README 'Proxy / Corporate Network' section for manual setup. The 'proxy' block below is a reserved placeholder for v2.x; v1.0 does not read it.

proxy._comment_v1_unused: NOT USED in v1.0. Leave as-is or remove.

options._comment_claude_winget: Anthropic Claude Code CLI via winget. Default: false (opt-in, requires subscription). Mutually exclusive with install_claude_npm (FR-305).
options._comment_claude_npm: Anthropic Claude Code CLI via npm. Installs Node.js LTS first. Default: false (opt-in). Mutually exclusive with install_claude_winget.
options._comment_obsidian: Obsidian markdown editor. Used as the project's vault viewer. Default: true.
options._comment_terminal: Windows Terminal (modern multi-tab terminal). Default: true.
options._comment_pwsh7: PowerShell 7 (modern cross-platform PowerShell; coexists with built-in 5.1). Default: true.
options._comment_ripgrep: ripgrep (rg) -- fast text search. Default: true.
options._comment_jq: jq -- JSON processor for strictdoc export output. Default: true.
options._comment_skip_clone: Skip Phase D entirely (no git clone, no junction). Default: false. Use when you have no GitHub account. Phase D is also skipped automatically when repository.url is empty.

vscode._comment: VS Code extensions auto-installed after VS Code itself (Phase A / Phase E). Add or remove extension IDs as needed.
